reusable_blocks.name: Dual H-bridge motor driver section

extractability.action: Reuse through labeled connector or harness after pinout, voltage, and ground gates close.

reusable_blocks.rationale: Discrete dual H-bridge stage feeding geared motor harnesses; keep motor connectors intact.

evidence_gates.prompt: Measure VMOTOR at J_LOGIC under no load and with one motor connected
Confirm motor harness pairs are not shorted to ground before splice

missing_evidence: Measure VMOTOR at J_LOGIC under no load and with one motor connected
Confirm motor harness pairs are not shorted to ground before splice

reusable_blocks.name: Left and right geared DC motors with wheels

extractability.action: Reuse through labeled connector or harness after pinout, voltage, and ground gates close.

reusable_blocks.rationale: Motors remain on original gearbox mounts; recover with harness intact when possible.

reusable_blocks.name: Battery input and protection section

extractability.action: Treat as a possible board-section salvage only after layout continuity, isolation, and thermal checks.

reusable_blocks.rationale: Possible cut candidate only if battery chemistry and fuse path are verified; prefer external USB pack for new build.

evidence_gates.prompt: Measure VMOTOR at J_LOGIC under no load and with one motor connected

reuse_ready_requires: current limit or load current known before interconnect
